mission: Improve the health and happiness of pets, pet parents, and veterinary professionals by reimagining the entire care experience
vision: Transform the fragmented veterinary industry through connected care — blending modern facilities with technology and a deep commitment to empathy

values.name: Winning as a Team
values.behavioral_definition: We place teamwork and mutual respect at the heart of personal and collective success — every role is essential, every voice matters

values.name: Always Getting Better
values.behavioral_definition: Lifelong learning propels us to constantly enhance our skills, support each other, and raise the standard of care

values.name: Empathy First
values.behavioral_definition: We embrace diverse perspectives and cultivate empathy and respect, strengthening our service to pets and their parents

values.name: Fear Free
values.behavioral_definition: We create low-stress, caring environments for pets and the people who love them — from clinic design to every interaction

values.name: Connected Care
values.behavioral_definition: We integrate everything pets and their parents need — from scheduled visits to virtual care — because the easier it is for the parent, the healthier the pet

annual_priorities.target: Continue growth trajectory from Series C

strategic_bets: Launch connected care app with 24/7 virtual vet access in all markets
PetfolkFlex relief staffing platform to reduce agency dependency
Partner Veterinarian ownership model to attract top clinical talent
Expand into Miami, Phoenix, and Kansas City by Q3 2026

departments.name: Clinical Operations
departments.head: Dr. Audrey Wystrach
departments.strategic_focus: Deliver Fear Free, best-in-class veterinary care across all clinics while maintaining 90+ NPS
departments.goal_contribution: Clinical excellence IS the product — NPS and care quality directly drive revenue growth and market reputation.

departments.name: Growth & Expansion
departments.head: Michael Wystrach
departments.strategic_focus: Open new clinics on schedule in target markets while maintaining quality standards and unit economics
departments.goal_contribution: Directly drives the 40-clinic target — every new clinic is new revenue and more pets served.

departments.name: Technology
departments.head: Oren Benvenisti
departments.strategic_focus: Build and scale the connected care platform — EMR integration, virtual care app, and operational tools
departments.goal_contribution: Tech enables connected care that differentiates Petfolk — virtual care, seamless booking, data-driven decisions.

departments.name: People & Culture
departments.head: VP, People
departments.strategic_focus: Attract, retain, and develop veterinary talent in a market with severe staffing shortages
departments.goal_contribution: Directly drives <20% turnover target. In an industry with 30%+ turnover, retention is the competitive moat.

departments.name: Marketing & Brand
departments.head: VP, Marketing
departments.strategic_focus: Build local brand awareness, drive new patient acquisition, and communicate the Petfolk difference
departments.goal_contribution: Fills the clinics — new patient volume drives revenue per clinic and validates expansion decisions.

departments.name: Finance
departments.head: Marcus Hill
departments.strategic_focus: Manage cash flow, clinic-level P&L, expansion capital allocation, and investor reporting
departments.goal_contribution: Financial discipline determines how many clinics we can open and how fast — gates the expansion target.
